live_message: John Park is on a call right now. The agent is qualifying him — daughter's six-month cleaning, asking about Saturday availability.
live_message_es: John Park está en una llamada ahora mismo. El agente lo está calificando — limpieza semestral para su hija, preguntando por disponibilidad el sábado.

calls.name: Maria Rodriguez

transcript.text: Bright Smile Dental, this is your scheduling assistant. How can I help you today?
Hi, I need to book a cleaning. It's been about seven months since my last one.
Sure, I can do that. Can I get your full name and date of birth so I can pull up your chart?
Maria Rodriguez, March 14th, 1986.
Got it, Maria. I see you're on Delta Dental and you're due. I have Thursday at 2:00 PM or Friday at 9:30 AM with Dr. Chen. Which works better?
Thursday two o'clock is perfect.
Done. You're booked for Thursday at 2:00 PM with Dr. Chen, 45 minutes. I'll text you a reminder the day before. Anything else?
No, that's it. Thank you.

calls.summary_long: Maria Rodriguez called at 10:47 AM to book her six-month cleaning. Verified Delta Dental insurance on file, confirmed she's due. Booked Thursday 2:00 PM with Dr. Chen (45m). SMS reminder scheduled 24h prior. No outstanding balance. Call ended cordially.

calls.name: Anonymous caller
calls.summary: Asked about office hours + insurance accepted

calls.name: John Park
calls.summary: Currently on call — daughter's six-month cleaning

transcript.text: Bright Smile Dental, this is your scheduling assistant. How can I help?
Hi, I need to schedule a cleaning for my daughter. She's nine.
Of course. Is she an existing patient or is this her first time with us?
She's been seen before. Last name Park, P-A-R-K, first name Sophia.
Got it. I see Sophia is due for her six-month cleaning. I have Saturday at 10:00 AM or Monday after school at 4:30 PM. Which works?
What about a different Saturday? This weekend is busy.

calls.summary_long: John Park calling about a six-month cleaning for his daughter Sophia (age 9). Existing patient, insurance verified. Discussing Saturday vs Monday after-school options. Call still in progress as of 9:34 AM.

calls.name: Sarah Liu

transcript.text: Bright Smile Dental, evening hours assistant. How can I help?
Hi, are you guys open? It says you close at six.
The office is closed for the night, but I can book you for tomorrow or whenever works. What did you need?
Oh great. I'm a new patient. I need a checkup and cleaning. My name is Sarah Liu.
Welcome, Sarah. New patient intake runs about an hour. I can do Friday at 11:00 AM or Tuesday at 3:00 PM. Which works?
Friday at eleven is great.
Booked. Friday 11:00 AM, new patient intake, one hour. I'll text you a digital intake form and directions. Have a good night, Sarah.

calls.summary_long: Sarah Liu called after hours at 7:42 PM as a new patient. Captured contact info, sent intake form via SMS. Booked Friday 11:00 AM new patient visit (60m). Standard new-patient workflow — agent did NOT need to wake the office.
